rules.name: Hardcoded Django Secret Key
rules.description: Django SECRET_KEY is hardcoded
rules.fix: Store SECRET_KEY in environment variables

rules.name: SQL Injection - String Formatting
rules.description: SQL query using string formatting (injection risk)
rules.fix: Use parameterized queries with placeholders

rules.name: SQL Injection - F-String
rules.description: SQL query using f-string (injection risk)
rules.fix: Use parameterized queries instead of f-strings

rules.name: Unsafe Pickle Usage
rules.description: pickle.loads() can execute arbitrary code
rules.owasp: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
rules.fix: Use JSON or validate pickle data source

rules.name: Unsafe YAML Load
rules.description: yaml.load() without SafeLoader can execute code
rules.owasp: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
rules.fix: Use yaml.safe_load() instead

rules.name: Command Injection - os.system
rules.description: os.system() with user input can lead to command injection
rules.fix: Use subprocess with list arguments instead

rules.name: Command Injection - subprocess.shell
rules.description: subprocess with shell=True can lead to command injection
rules.fix: Use shell=False and pass command as list

rules.name: Path Traversal Risk
rules.description: File operations with .. can lead to path traversal
rules.fix: Validate and sanitize file paths

rules.name: Django Debug Mode
rules.description: Django DEBUG should be False in production
rules.fix: Set DEBUG = False in production settings

rules.name: Flask Debug Mode
rules.description: Flask debug mode should be disabled in production
rules.fix: Set debug=False in production

rules.name: Weak Hash Algorithm
rules.description: MD5 or SHA1 used for hashing
rules.fix: Use hashlib.sha256() or stronger

rules.name: Insecure Random
rules.description: random module is not cryptographically secure
rules.fix: Use secrets module for security-sensitive operations

rules.name: SQL Injection - Django Raw Query
rules.description: Django raw() query with string formatting
rules.fix: Use Django ORM or parameterized raw queries

rules.name: XSS - Django mark_safe
rules.description: mark_safe() can lead to XSS if input is not sanitized
rules.fix: Sanitize user input before using mark_safe()

rules.name: Disabled CSRF Protection
rules.description: CSRF protection disabled
rules.fix: Only disable CSRF for specific API endpoints, not views

rules.name: Insecure SSL Context
rules.description: SSL certificate verification disabled
rules.fix: Always verify SSL certificates in production

rules.name: Hardcoded Database Credentials
rules.description: Database credentials hardcoded in settings
rules.fix: Use environment variables for database credentials

rules.name: Unsafe Template Rendering
rules.description: Template rendering without autoescape
rules.fix: Enable autoescape in templates

rules.name: Mass Assignment Vulnerability
rules.description: Direct assignment from request data without filtering
rules.fix: Explicitly define allowed fields for mass assignment

rules.name: Unsafe Redirect
rules.description: Unvalidated redirect can lead to phishing
rules.fix: Validate redirect URLs against whitelist
